name: Shelter Signal V2 Daily Digest HTTP Dry-Run

nodes.name: POST Local Dry-Run Bridge
nodes.notes: Start the local bridge first with: python scripts/serve_daily_digest_dry_run.py. This request calls POST http://127.0.0.1:8787/dry-run and returns JSON. No credentials, recipients, SMTP settings, or email sending are used.

parameters.content:
Expected response

The HTTP Request node should return JSON like:

{
  "status": "ok",
  "dry_run_result": { "result": "PASS" },
  "alert_candidate_count": 12,
  "json_export_path": "data/exports/email_digest_preview.json",
  "html_export_path": "data/exports/email_digest_preview.html",
  "message": "PASS daily digest preview dry-run complete. No email was sent."
}

If status is error, inspect message and the local bridge terminal logs.

Email sending intentionally omitted

This HTTP dry-run workflow only verifies preview generation through the local bridge. Do not add Gmail/SMTP credentials, recipients, SMS, auth, API keys, or real sending behavior in this stage.
